    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    I

    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    Database identifier of the log entry.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Database identifier of the device.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyLogResponse
    Database identifier of the log entry.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.NotificationResponse
    Database identifier of the notification.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RoomResponse
    Database identifier of the room.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Database identifier of the rule.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneDeviceStateResponse
    Database identifier of the entry.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.SceneResponse
    Database identifier of the scene.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Unique identifier of the schedule.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.UserResponse
    Unique identifier of the user.
    id - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    Unique identifier of the vacation mode entry.
    inviteMember(Long, InviteRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.UserResource
    Invites a new member by creating an account with MEMBER role (FR-20).
    InviteRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for inviting a member by email (FR-20).
    InviteRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.InviteRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    IoTException - Ausnahmeklasse in at.jku.se.iot
    Checked exception raised for errors from IoT protocol adapters.
    IoTException(String) - Konstruktor für Ausnahmeklasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTException
    Creates an exception with a message.
    IoTException(String, Throwable) - Konstruktor für Ausnahmeklasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTException
    Creates an exception with a message and root cause.
    IoTIntegrationService - Klasse in at.jku.se.iot
    Bridges the SmartHome device layer with physical IoT hardware.
    IoTIntegrationService() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTIntegrationService
    Creates the service; intended for CDI instantiation.
    IoTProtocol - Schnittstelle in at.jku.se.iot
    Abstraction for IoT communication protocols (MQTT, CoAP, Zigbee, etc.).
    IoTProtocolFactory - Klasse in at.jku.se.iot
    Factory that creates the appropriate IoT protocol adapter based on configuration.
    IoTProtocolFactory() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocolFactory
    Creates the factory; intended for CDI instantiation.
    IoTResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST endpoint exposing IoT integration status (FR-18).
    IoTResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.IoTResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    isConnected() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.IoTIntegrationService
    Indicates whether the underlying protocol adapter is connected.
    isConnected() - Methode in Schnittstelle at.jku.se.iot.IoTProtocol
    Indicates whether the protocol adapter currently has an open connection.
    isConnected() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MockProtocolAdapter
     
    isConnected() - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
